title: Buyer Rescue Workflow
thesis: A buyer support failure becomes a reusable, verified workflow improvement rather than a forgotten ticket.
problem: A buyer cannot access a download, receipt, or onboarding step. Ordinary support replies solve one case but rarely improve the system.
mission: Convert the support scenario into a GoalOS proof mission: diagnose the weak workflow, generate v1.1, validate with a reviewer, and publish a public-safe Proof Card.
why: This is the simplest proof that GoalOS turns everyday AI work into reusable operational intelligence.
goals: Create the first public-safe Proof Card
Show non-technical buyers why proof matters
rsi: The improved support workflow earns scoped reuse only after evidence, review, and claim-boundary checks. Future support work inherits the validated artifact, not the unproven draft.
agialpha: AGIALPHA coordinates the sponsor mission, builder claim bond, proof submission bond, reviewer bond, proof-card action, credential action, and reputation-linked settlement.
